aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Champion HVAC Service due to insufficient conversational content and missing schema markup, despite having a strong local presence.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC queries and answers.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC repair and maintenance tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact info, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: Missing Service schema for specific HVAC services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'emergency HVAC repair in Denver' and 'best HVAC services near me'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with Denver-specific HVAC questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting NATE certification and 24/7 emergency services to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Champion HVAC Service misses out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with FAQ and HowTo schema consistently appear in AI-driven search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates schema markup, conversational content, and GBP optimization to ensure AI models cite your services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI; the longer you wait, the more ground you lose.

email_subject_line: Dominate Denver HVAC with AI-Ready Optimization
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC services stand out to AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven searches.
